subtitle: Stays, Dining, Safaris & More
shortDescription: Book stays, dining, safaris, car hire, and find travel companions — all in one premium travel app.
fullDescription:
Tripsbnb is your all-in-one travel companion. Whether you're booking luxury accommodations, discovering local restaurants, planning safari adventures, hiring a car, or finding travel companions — Tripsbnb brings everything together in a single, beautifully designed app.

Key Features:

- STAYS & ACCOMMODATIONS: Browse houses, villas, hotels, cabins, treehouses, and 15+ property types. Filter by price, amenities, rooms, and more. Monthly apartment deals available.

- DINING: Discover restaurants, cafes, bars, and fine dining. See real-time open/closed status, delivery options, and reserve tables. Order food for delivery or pickup.

- SAFARI ADVENTURES: Book curated safari experiences with verified local guides.

- CAR HIRE: Rent vehicles with comprehensive protection plans including insurance, GPS tracking, and damage reporting.

- TRAVEL COMPANIONS: Discover verified travel companions with a swipe-based matching system and in-app chat.

- DESTINATION GUIDE: AI-powered guides with hidden gems, budget tips, local transport, cultural etiquette, and mega events.

- TRAVEL TOOLKIT: Currency converter (44+ currencies), AI-powered packing lists, and emergency information for any destination.

- DEALS & BUNDLES: Flash deals, early-bird discounts, group savings, and curated travel bundles.

- SECURE PAYMENTS: All transactions powered by Stripe with 24/7 support and verified vendors.

- IN-APP CHAT: Communicate safely with vendors through our content-filtered messaging system.

- MULTI-LANGUAGE: Available in 14 languages with auto-detection.

Travel without boundaries. Download Tripsbnb today.
keywords: travel, booking, stays, accommodation, safari, dining, restaurants, car hire, rental, companions, deals, destination guide, currency converter, hotel, villa, vacation
